goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'norwich' and should 'leave after 09:45'.
The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
